title: pavonia pabstii
intro: Pavonia pabstii, also known as Pabst's rosemallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, native to Mexico. Traditionally, Pavonia pabstii has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia pabstii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
